pi_items.source: Task description directly specifies saving to this path.
Task description requires creating a calendar named 'Swing Shift'.
Task description requires assigning the calendar to 'Carol Williams'.
Task description specifies working hours 14:00 to 22:00. MS Project XML format uses HH:MM:SS.
Task description specifies working hours 14:00 to 22:00. MS Project XML format uses HH:MM:SS.
Task description specifies Monday through Friday. Confirmed DayType 2-6 maps to Mon-Fri in MS Project XML (MSPDI) schema via web search.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a calendar named 'Swing Shift' with working hours from 14:00:00 to 22:00:00 on Monday through Friday (DayTypes 2-6 in MS Project XML). This calendar must be assigned to 'Carol Williams' (Resource ID 3), and the project saved to '/home/ga/Projects/swing_shift_project.xml'. The starting data is a synthetic 'Commercial Construction' sample project.
